creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
Daniel Gerzo wrote:
> Hello Gabor,
>
> Sunday, October 1, 2006, 7:12:09 PM, you wrote:
>
>   
>> We can now use standard entities in .xsl files as well.
>>     
>
> Is there any benefit when we use this entity instead of the
> original one?
>
>   
Hi,

only a minor.  If a future translator starts a new translation, (s)he 
won't have to deal with these, since ® works well under all 
character sets, while &#nnn; codes are charset-specific. Personally, I 
also consider entities better readable.

-- 
Cheers,

Gabor
